summary: La Mia TV features testing complete. All backend endpoints working correctly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend page renders correctly at /my-tv route with empty state (no released series in DB). Admin reset includes 'sequels' collection in deletion list (verified at line 227 of admin_recovery.py).
critical_code_review_comments: EmittenteTVPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (my-tv-page, my-tv-empty, my-tv-loading, my-tv-tab-*, my-tv-create-series, my-tv-create-anime)
Backend my-dashboard endpoint (line 699) correctly returns airing, completed, catalog, pipeline arrays with stats
Admin reset-game endpoint (line 201) includes 'sequels' in content_collections list at line 227
Route /my-tv properly configured in App.js with ProtectedRoute wrapper

success_rate.frontend: 100% (page renders correctly with empty state, all data-testid attributes present)

context_for_next_testing_agent: La Mia TV page shows empty state because there are no released series (only 2 pipeline projects). To test the full page with tabs (In Onda, Completate, Catalogo, In Produzione), need to release a series first. Backend endpoints all working: my-dashboard returns correct structure, broadcast-episode/send-to-tv/renew-season/renewal-status all return expected responses.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/pipeline-series-v3/tv/my-dashbo: 200 OK - returns airing, completed, catalog, pipeline arrays with stats
backend_endpoints.GET /api/pipeline-series-v3/series/{id}/: 200 OK - returns has_renewal: false for invalid ID
backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/recovery/reset-game: 200 OK for admin user, includes 'sequels' in deletion list

frontend_page.empty_state: Shows correctly when no series released
frontend_page.create_buttons: 'Crea Serie TV' and 'Crea Anime' buttons present

console_errors_observed: 404 errors for some resources (likely missing images/assets - not related to La Mia TV feature)
Warning: Missing Description for DialogContent (minor React warning)
